about.description: Ethernal combines blockchain security with traditional financial planning to deliver a decentralized, transparent, and accessible retirement experience for everyone.

balance.title: Balance Verification
balance.subtitle: We check your wallet on-chain. No gas, no transaction.

allowance.title: Current Allowance
allowance.needApproval: You'll need to sign an approval tx (one-time).

balance.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance. Get more test USDC from the faucet before continuing.

approve.title: Authorize USDC
approve.subtitle: Allow the Factory to move your tokens (one-time)

whatIs.title: What is Approve?
whatIs.description: On Ethereum, ERC-20 tokens (like USDC) require you to explicitly authorize a contract before it can move them. It's a security standard: the contract can only spend up to the approved amount.
whatIs.note: This approval does **not** move any funds. The transfer happens in the next step.

create.title: Create the Fund
create.subtitle: The factory will deploy your personal contract and make the initial deposit

success.title: Fund Created!
success.subtitle: Your personal contract now lives on the blockchain.

nextSteps.step2: Track your progress and DeFi performance from the Dashboard.
nextSteps.step3: Once the timelock ends, you can start scheduled withdrawals.
